raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, which most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level prose review rather than higher-level research evaluation.","RX.1":"Any assessment should disclose uncertainty because the request gives no specific review criterion.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid inflating a vague paragraph-level request into full novelty, experimental, or literature validation.","RX.3":"The responsibility remains limited to inspecting the provided paragraph rather than acting on or rewriting the artifact.","RX.4":"A review of research claims should avoid encouraging misleading, unsafe, or unsupported downstream interpretations.","RX.5":"Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to the provided paragraph text and the exact delegation."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, which most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level prose review rather than higher-level research evaluation.
rationale.RX.1: Any assessment should disclose uncertainty because the request gives no specific review criterion.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inflating a vague paragraph-level request into full novelty, experimental, or literature validation.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility remains limited to inspecting the provided paragraph rather than acting on or rewriting the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: A review of research claims should avoid encouraging misleading, unsafe, or unsupported downstream interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to the provided paragraph text and the exact delegation.
